basic_details.job_title: Angul Forest Division Sociologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Angul Forest Division Sociologist Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website odishaforest.in . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the AFD Sociologist Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 50 years who have completed Graduation with minimum three years of experience in the development sector working with communities and village-level institutions are eligible to apply for these Sociologist vacancies. The offline application process for AFD Sociologist Recruitment 2026 has started on 05 May 2026 and will remain open until 20 May 2026. Can

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Graduate with minimum three years experience working in the development sector directly with communities and village-level institutions. Preferable: Ability to speak/understand local language, from Angul district. Must be able to speak, read and write Odia.

selection_process: Walk in Interview Document Verification Counselling
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Angul Forest Division Sociologist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://odishaforest.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Angul Forest Division Sociologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Angul Forest Division Sociologist recruitment is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Sociologist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available for the Sociologist post in the Angul Forest Division.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Sociologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate with a minimum of three years of experience working in the development sector with communities and village-level institutions. They must also be able to speak, read, and write Odia.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Sociologist post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Sociologist post is between 18 years and 50 years as of 31st March 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Sociologist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 15000 plus Rs. 3000 TA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Angul Forest Division Sociologist recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Sociologist post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, Document Verification, and Counselling.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can download the official notification and application form from the official website of Angul Forest Division, which is https://odishaforest.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 03/2026-27/DFO ANG/1F.
